dishes.title: ROASTED LAMB RUMP
dishes.description: Tender roasted lamb rump served with rosemary jus, seasonal roasted vegetables, and creamy mashed potatoes. A classic fine dining experience.

dishes.title: CITRUS CURED SALMON
dishes.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon cured with a blend of citrus zest, dill, and sea salt. Served with microgreens and a light lemon vinaigrette.

dishes.title: PAN SEARED SEA BASS
dishes.description: Perfectly pan-seared sea bass fillet with crispy skin, accompanied by sautéed asparagus and a delicate beurre blanc sauce.

dishes.title: STUFFED STRAWBERRY
dishes.description: Fresh strawberries stuffed with whipped mascarpone cream and drizzled with dark chocolate ganache. A wonderful dessert experience.

dishes.title: BEEF BURGER MEAL
dishes.description: Juicy handcrafted beef patty with cheddar cheese, caramelized onions, fresh lettuce, and our signature sauce on a brioche bun. Served with fries.

dishes.title: MUSSELS SOUP
dishes.description: A rich and creamy mussel soup prepared with white wine, garlic, shallots, and fresh herbs. Served with crusty artisan bread.

dishes.title: ITALIAN SPAGHETTI
dishes.description: Traditional Italian spaghetti tossed in a slow-cooked tomato basil sauce with parmesan shavings. An authentic taste of Italy.

dishes.title: GRILLED FISH
dishes.description: Freshly grilled whole fish marinated with herbs and spices, served with grilled vegetables and a tangy chimichurri sauce.
